case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. LINDA TEP

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-21-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-21-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TEP, LINDA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TEP, LINDA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-11-2019
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100069332), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED SEP-19-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TEP, LINDA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEP, LINDA $1,582.41 PRINCIPAL, $240.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,822.91, SEE SCANNED DOC
